skills.name: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
skills.description: Systematic practice of increasing the percentage of users who take desired actions across websites, landing pages, and product experiences. Involves hypothesis development, A/B testing, multivariate testing, user behavior analysis, and iterative optimization of conversion funnels.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands CRO fundamentals including conversion funnels, basic A/B test setup, and key metrics (conversion rate, bounce rate, click-through rate). Can identify obvious friction points in user flows.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Designs and runs structured A/B testing programs with proper statistical methodology. Manages CRO tools (Optimizely, VWO, Google Optimize). Analyzes test results with statistical significance and translates findings into actionable improvements. Builds experimentation roadmaps.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Leads enterprise-wide CRO strategy across multiple markets and products. Designs complex multivariate and personalization experiments. Builds experimentation culture and frameworks that scale. Connects CRO impact to revenue and business outcomes. Mentors teams on experimentation methodology.

skills.name: Marketing Experimentation & A/B Testing
skills.description: Designing, executing, and analyzing structured marketing experiments to validate hypotheses and drive measurable improvements. Includes A/B testing, multivariate testing, holdout groups, incrementality testing, and building systematic experimentation programs with statistical rigor.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands basic A/B testing concepts, can set up simple split tests, and interprets results at a surface level. Aware of statistical significance but relies on tools to calculate it.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Designs structured testing roadmaps with clear hypotheses, success metrics, and sample size calculations. Runs tests across multiple channels (web, email, ads, landing pages). Understands statistical significance, confidence intervals, and common testing pitfalls (peeking, novelty effects).
proficiency_levels.advanced: Builds organization-wide experimentation programs with governance, documentation, and knowledge sharing. Designs complex experiments including multivariate tests, sequential testing, and incrementality measurement. Quantifies experiment impact on business metrics and makes resource allocation decisions based on test velocity and win rates.

skills.name: Funnel Analysis & Optimization
skills.description: Analyzing and optimizing user journeys across acquisition, activation, conversion, and retention stages. Involves mapping funnel stages, identifying drop-off points, diagnosing root causes, and implementing improvements to increase throughput at each stage.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can map basic funnel stages and identify where users drop off using analytics tools. Understands key funnel metrics (conversion rate per stage, drop-off rate).
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Performs detailed funnel analysis by segment, cohort, and channel. Identifies root causes of funnel friction using qualitative and quantitative data. Prioritizes optimization opportunities by impact and effort. Tracks funnel improvements over time.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs end-to-end funnel architectures across complex multi-product, multi-market environments. Builds predictive models for funnel performance. Optimizes funnels holistically across acquisition, activation, monetization, and retention. Connects funnel metrics to unit economics (CAC, LTV, payback period).

skills.name: Paid Social Advertising (Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn)
skills.description: Planning, executing, and optimizing paid advertising campaigns on social media platforms including Meta (Facebook/Instagram), TikTok, LinkedIn, and emerging social channels. Covers audience targeting, bid strategies, creative optimization, budget management, and platform-specific best practices.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can set up basic campaigns on Meta Ads Manager with standard targeting and bidding. Understands campaign structure (campaign, ad set, ad) and basic metrics (CPM, CPC, CTR). Follows platform best practices for ad formats.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages large-budget campaigns across Meta, TikTok, and/or LinkedIn with full ownership of performance. Builds custom and lookalike audiences, implements advanced bidding strategies, and optimizes for down-funnel events (purchases, signups). Runs structured creative tests and scales winning combinations.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Manages multi-million dollar monthly budgets across multiple social platforms with consistent ROAS targets. Develops platform-specific strategies that account for algorithm differences, attribution models, and creative requirements. Builds automated rules and scripts for campaign optimization. Pioneers testing on emerging platforms.

skills.name: Paid Search Advertising (Google Ads, Bing)
skills.description: Managing paid search campaigns across Google Ads (Search, Shopping, Display, YouTube, UAC) and Bing Ads. Includes keyword strategy, bid management, ad copywriting, quality score optimization, campaign structure, and performance analysis.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can set up basic search campaigns with keyword research, ad copy, and standard bidding. Understands match types, quality score components, and basic campaign structure.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages complex campaign structures across Search, Display, YouTube, and/or UAC with significant budgets. Optimizes bids, keywords, and ad copy based on conversion data. Implements negative keywords, audience layering, and automated bidding strategies. Manages Google Ads for app install or lead generation at scale.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Manages multi-million dollar Google Ads portfolios with full P&L accountability. Builds sophisticated bidding strategies using scripts, rules, and third-party tools. Optimizes across the full Google ecosystem (Search, Shopping, Display, YouTube, UAC, Performance Max). Deep understanding of auction dynamics, attribution, and incrementality.

skills.name: Media Planning & Budget Management
skills.description: Developing media plans that allocate budgets across channels, platforms, and campaigns to maximize return on ad spend. Includes forecasting, pacing, budget optimization, channel mix modeling, and regular performance reporting against spend targets.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can create basic media plans with budget allocation across 2-3 channels. Understands pacing and can monitor spend against targets. Produces basic spend reports.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Develops monthly/quarterly media plans with channel mix optimization based on historical performance. Manages significant budgets with dynamic reallocation based on real-time performance. Forecasts expected returns and adjusts plans proactively. Presents budget recommendations to leadership.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Builds sophisticated multi-channel media strategies with econometric or incrementality-based budget allocation. Manages multi-million dollar budgets across 5+ channels with P&L ownership. Develops attribution models that inform channel mix decisions. Negotiates rates and terms with platforms and partners.

skills.name: Campaign Analytics & Attribution
skills.description: Measuring and analyzing marketing campaign performance using analytics platforms, attribution models, and tracking infrastructure. Includes pixel/tag implementation, UTM strategy, multi-touch attribution, mobile measurement (MMPs), and building performance dashboards.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands basic attribution concepts (last-click, first-click). Can set up UTM parameters and read standard reports in GA4 or similar tools. Familiar with key metrics (CPA, ROAS, CTR).
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Implements and manages tracking infrastructure including pixels, server-side tracking, and MMP integration (AppsFlyer, Adjust). Builds performance dashboards in Looker/Tableau. Understands multi-touch attribution models and can evaluate campaign performance across channels. Conducts cohort and LTV analysis.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs attribution frameworks that account for cross-device, cross-channel, and offline touchpoints. Builds incrementality testing programs to validate true campaign impact. Develops custom attribution models. Ensures data integrity across complex tracking ecosystems. Connects marketing attribution to revenue and unit economics.

skills.name: Creative Strategy for Performance Marketing
skills.description: Developing and iterating on ad creative strategies that drive measurable performance outcomes. Includes briefing creative teams, analyzing creative performance data, building creative testing frameworks, understanding platform-specific creative best practices, and scaling winning creative concepts.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can brief basic ad creatives with clear messaging and call-to-action. Understands which ad formats work on major platforms. Reviews creative performance at a surface level (CTR, engagement).
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Builds structured creative testing programs with hypothesis-driven iterations. Analyzes creative performance data to identify winning elements (hooks, formats, messaging). Briefs and collaborates with designers and video editors effectively. Adapts creative strategy by platform (Meta vs TikTok vs Google). Leverages AI tools for creative generation and iteration.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Leads creative strategy across large-scale UA operations. Builds creative production systems that maximize output velocity, diversity, and win rates. Develops creative frameworks that connect performance data to creative decisions. Manages internal and external creative teams. Pioneers AI-powered creative workflows.

skills.name: User Acquisition Partnerships & Networks
skills.description: Building and managing relationships with acquisition partners including ad networks, DSPs, SDK networks, affiliate networks, and platform representatives. Includes partner evaluation, onboarding, performance optimization, and negotiating terms to maximize acquisition efficiency.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands the landscape of acquisition partners and networks. Can manage basic partner relationships and monitor performance. Familiar with DSP, SSP, and SDK network concepts.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Actively manages a portfolio of acquisition partners with regular performance reviews and optimization. Evaluates and onboards new partners based on strategic fit. Negotiates rates and terms. Builds strong working relationships with platform representatives.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Develops and scales a comprehensive partner ecosystem across multiple channels and regions. Builds strategic partnerships that provide competitive advantages (early access, custom integrations, preferred rates). Designs partner evaluation frameworks and attribution methodologies for partner traffic.

skills.name: Engagement & Personalization Tools
skills.description: Managing and optimizing website engagement and personalization tools including chatbots, pop-ups, overlays, banners, interactive product tours, and personalization engines. Involves configuring triggers, conversational flows, targeting rules, and measuring impact on conversion and engagement metrics.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Can set up basic pop-ups and chatbot flows using standard tools. Understands targeting triggers (time on page, scroll depth, exit intent). Monitors basic engagement metrics.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages multiple engagement tools (Drift, TrenDemon, Navattic, Intercom) with sophisticated targeting and personalization rules. Designs conversational chatbot flows with handoff behaviors. A/B tests engagement variants and optimizes based on conversion impact. Implements personalization across localized websites.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Builds comprehensive engagement and personalization strategies across multiple markets and segments. Integrates engagement tools with CRM, marketing automation, and analytics platforms. Designs AI-powered chatbot and personalization experiences. Measures incremental impact of engagement tools on pipeline and revenue.
